requestedItems.label: Property identifier
requestedItems.prompt: Provide the property address or permit-ready property identifier for the project.

evidence.summary: Residential permit intake requires project property information before application review.

requestedItems.label: Construction plans PDF
requestedItems.prompt: Upload the project construction plans as a searchable PDF prepared for PP&D review.

evidence.sourceTitle: Apply for a permit or request plan review
evidence.summary: Plan-review workflows require drawing plans and supporting submittal documents before submission.

requestedItems.label: Single PDF Process acknowledgment
requestedItems.prompt: Confirm you reviewed the Single PDF Process requirement for drawing plans and separate supporting PDFs.

evidence.summary: Public guidance describes the Single PDF Process file organization for plans and supporting documents.

requestedItems.label: Submission readiness decision
requestedItems.prompt: Decide whether the application package is ready for DevHub submission after review of missing facts, files, and acknowledgments.

evidence.summary: DevHub is the online permitting system, so official submission must remain gated by explicit user confirmation.
